nasb.text: God comes from Teman, And the Holy One from Mount Paran. Selah. His splendor covers the heavens, And the earth is full of His praise.

esv.text: God came from Teman, and the Holy One from Mount Paran. Selah His splendor covered the heavens, and the earth was full of his praise.

cnv.text: 神由提幔而來，聖者從巴蘭山臨到。 他的榮光瀰漫穹蒼，讚美他的聲音響徹大地。

ccb.text: 上帝从提幔来， 圣者从巴兰山来。（细拉） 祂的荣耀遮蔽诸天， 颂赞祂的声音响彻大地。
